mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_attachment ( biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, storage_type, bucket_name, object_key, file_url, uploader_id, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{fileName}, #{fileExt}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{storageType}, #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{fileUrl}, #{uploaderId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_size, content_type, file_url FROM biz_attachment WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, storage_type, bucket_name, object_key, file_url, uploader_id, created_by, updated_by FROM biz_attachment WHERE deleted = 0 AND biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, storage_type, bucket_name, object_key, file_url, uploader_id, created_by, updated_by FROM biz_attachment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_size, content_type, file_url FROM biz_attachment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_attachment SET file_url = #{fileUrl}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_attachment SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_attachment SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} AND deleted = 0
